games.overview:
Show off your style by designing homes for all of your favorite Animal Crossing villagers! Use your creativity to design the perfect houses - inside and out - for both old and new friends. With the new amiibo cards, you can call your favorite villagers into the game.

Features:

Design the interior and exterior of hundreds of homes for animal villagers
Leave your decorative touch on the school, hospital and other public facilities
Collect and Connect - Collect and share amiibo cards of your favorite villagers, and invite them into your game,

Tap amiibo cards to invite up to four characters into a room to hang out
Tap the amiibo cards of special characters to call in animals that would otherwise not appear in your game with requests

games.game_title: Animal Forest: Happy Home Designer [Amiibo Reader/Writer Bundle]
games.overview:
Animal Crossing: Happy Home Designer is a sandbox game for the Nintendo 3DS released in 2015. It is a spin-off entry in the Animal Crossing series where the player designs homes for clients. It is also the first entry in the series to be compatible with amiibo, utilizing a series of Animal Crossing amiibo cards that were released alongside the game.
The Nintendo 3DS NFC Reader/Writer is used for getting additional content in your game AND save certain game data to the amiibo figure. One amiibo can only hold save data for one game at a time. The Nintendo 3DS NFC Reader/Writer is required to use amiibo cards with Nintendo 3DS, Nintendo 3DS XL, and Nintendo 2DS systems. The New Nintendo 3DS system doesn't require the use of the NFC Reader/Writer Pack, since it has a built-in NFC Reader.
